section.heading: Consultations with Congress

content.p: The President shall consult with the appropriate congressional committees on a periodic basis to review the operation of the Facility under this subchapter and the eligibility of countries for benefits from the Facility under this subchapter.

section.sourceCredit: (July 10, 1954, ch. 469, title VI, § 615, as added Pub. L. 102–237, title III, § 331, Dec. 13, 1991, 105 Stat. 1858.)
